prompt: Improve the weak-model-unfriendly `task-wave` skill draft in `evals/files/task-wave-draft/` and save the revised skill to `outputs/task-wave/`. Keep the existing name, make the workflow concise and explicit for weaker models, replace generic validation advice with repo-specific commands, and add or update `evals/evals.json`. Also write `outputs/output.md` describing the benchmark workspace layout you would use.
assertions: Generated skill preserves the name task-wave.
Generated skill uses exact repo validation commands instead of generic npm test or npm run build.
Generated output describes sibling workspace layout skills/<skill>-workspace/iteration-N.
Generated evals.json includes at least 3 evals.
